body:
This PR cleans up the documentation with respect to rendering.

For example, these pages should be fixed
1. https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/stable/APIs/SoilAlbedo/
2. https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/stable/APIs/Simulations/
3. https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/stable/APIs/canopy/Photosynthesis/
title: Clean up documentation

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This adds Nat's refactored observation calibration tutorial. The previous mismatch with data was primarily caused by the diurnal average function being computed on the entire observation stream, but only the first three months of the year for the simulation, so there was a large discrepancy due to the seasonal cycle.

@imreddyTeja also found that increasing the update frequency improved the quality of the model a lot! When updating only every 3 hours, there was a large (~5 hour?) phase shift between the model and data diurnal cycles

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: Calibrate against observations tutorial

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Increase from 1e-8 to 1 m, to avoid `h_atmos < h_canopy` for SF calculations. Adds an assertion in the `LandSimulation` constructor that `h_atmos >= h_canopy`.

closes #1333
title: increase h_atmos of prescribed analytic forcing
